# CopyMe

> CopyMe is a messaging platform built around intentionality. Its "Rule of 7" is a constraint system that replaces communication noise with meaning, so every message is deliberate. Chat with anyone, anywhere, across 100+ languages.

## What CopyMe is

- A cross-platform messaging app for intentional communication — the opposite of infinite-feed, notification-driven chat.
- The Rule of 7: a deliberate constraint system that limits noise and forces meaning into each exchange.
- Real-time translation across 100+ languages, so people communicate across language barriers.

## Plans

- Free, Pro, and Business tiers. Pro and Business are distinct — Business adds team/organization features.
- Pricing: https://copyme1.com/pricing
